failures.description: The agent misread or misused the catalog search result and answered with item 1507389580 at $1157.86, even though the tool result showed item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone using the ProductCatalogSearch result. The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and clearly listed two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99, then item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer that contradicted this tool output by selecting the higher-priced item as the cheapest. This is not an invocation error or underspecification; it is a reasoning error over available tool output.
